_comment: Provider selection + config for signal 2 (Google Trends) and signal 3 (PharmEasy lab positivity). MOCK is the default until the real feeds are wired. Signal 1 (weather) is configured in scoring.json + src/providers/. Cadence: weather daily, trends weekly (SerpApi x5 -> data/trends.json), lab daily (Google Sheet).

serpapi._note: Used by the WEEKLY build_trends.py (5 keys in Actions secrets, failover). Google Trends granularity is sub-region (state), so a city inherits its state's interest. terms are OR-joined per disease.

googlesheet._note: Published-to-web CSV path. Set csv_url to the sheet's File > Share > Publish to web > CSV link, then set provider to 'googlesheet'. Format: docs/lab_feed_format.md.

gsheet_api._note: LIVE 2026 feed via Google Sheets API + service account (sheet stays private). Setup: enable Sheets API, create a service account, share the sheet with its email as Viewer, provide its JSON key via env GOOGLE_SHEETS_SA_JSON / GOOGLE_SHEETS_SA_FILE or key_file below (gitignored). Then set provider to 'gsheet_api'. window_days = trailing days summed before the 30-test gate.
